title: Create: Physics and Roads
description: A Create modpack centered around physics, roads, and vehicles, featuring planes, cars, trucks, and more.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d10768aad340d7d7f60dc69110273cbe1b032238_0.webp)

**I’ve decided to archive this modpack due to complications during development. I’m focusing on improving the sequence of this modpack instead.**

The Sequence is now available

**A modpack based on [Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** * This modpack allows you to create almost any vehicle you see on YouTube. * It is primarily intended for Creative mode, but Survival mode is also possible. ### Credits **Intro** * [Reimagined Intro](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-intro) — I used this intro because I thought it looked cool. CurseForge Mods - ProjectE **People** * [Brickyboy](https://modrinth.com/user/Brickyboy) — Helped me fix several crashes. * [NoobTrieu](https://modrinth.com/user/NoobTrieu) — Creator of [Reimagined Intro](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-intro). * [Potato](https://www.youtube.com/@theplasticpotato) — I used one of his [songs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BcwpQgv_k-k) in the modpack’s main menu. --- **Note:** This modpack is not lightweight at all, so you’ll need a fairly powerful PC to run it. Otherwise, you may experience very low FPS. **Another Note:** This modpack requires minimum 6GB of ram but recommended is 8GB allocated for minecraft.
